nasb.text: And Jesus cried out and said, “He who believes in Me, does not believe in Me but in Him who sent Me.

esv.text: And Jesus cried out and said, “Whoever believes in me, believes not in me but in him who sent me.

cnv.text: 耶穌大聲說：“信我的，不單是信我，也是信那差我來的。

ccb.text: 耶稣高声说：“信我的，其实不只是信我，而是信差我来的那位。

csbs.text: 耶稣喊着说：“信我的人，不是信我，而是信派我来的那一位。
